steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: To present contextual analysis to an audience unfamiliar with the concept, you need to define or explain what the approach is—not just contrast it with another method or show only an example of it.

steps.title: Choose the option that defines the concept
steps.content:
Choice C defines contextual analysis directly as an approach to art criticism that considers historical and cultural contexts. The other choices don't define contextual analysis—they either focus on pattern analysis, provide only an example, or make a contrast without explanation.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
